title: Scope of Regular Assessment
content: The Assessment shall be undertaken as a requirement for upgrading of the provisional license to a regular license, renewal of license and branch authority, transfer of office, and once every two (2) years after renewal of license. The Assessment shall cover the following: a. Maintenance of the minimum office space, facilities and equipment; b. Maintenance of the required signages and postings, such as POEA door sticker, agency license, organizational chart, 'Kaukulang Bayad' poster and anti-illegal recruitment campaign posters; c. Examination of books of accounts, official receipts, and financial statements; and d. Compliance with general labor standards and occupational safety and health standards.
